description: Enable Customer Portal access for the contact 'Elena Rostova' and log an onboarding ticket in Vtiger CRM. Update the contact's details to Title: 'VP of Operations' and Department: 'IT'. Configure her portal access for the period 2026-03-01 to 2027-02-28. Create a ticket linked to her record with the title 'VIP Onboarding - Elena Rostova', Priority 'High', Status 'Open', and description 'Please schedule the VIP portal onboarding call.'
